articles.title: More Ateneo players appear before PNP-CIDG amid drowning probe

Among those seen entering the CIDG shortly after 9:30 a.m. was Shawn Tuano. Several former and current ADMU players also appeared before the PNP-CIDG on Tuesday. READ: Ateneo players ‘fully cooperating’ with PNP CIDG probe — lawyer The players were accompanied by their lawyers. Neither the players nor the lawyers issued a statement to the media.
